who: HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 employee benefits enrollments/month
offer: For HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5–15 employee benefits enrollments/month, manual data entry causes compliance delays. We automate data extraction and formatting instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
problem: Difficulty in compiling and formatting employee benefits enrollment data for compliance reporting.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions on HR workflows

Engage in community forums for HR tools sharing
try_it: Let users try data extraction from existing HR systems and manual adjustments
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing data
Facilitate one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process to fewer steps
